d.t: Kể về chuyến đi cuối tuần

e.p: Where did you go last weekend?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn đã đến. Nói một việc bạn làm ở đó.
e.h: Past simple: I went to..., I played...
e.s: I went to the mountains. I walked a lot and enjoyed the view.

e.p: Who did you go with?
e.m: Nói người bạn đi cùng. Nói cảm xúc của bạn về chuyến đi.
e.h: Past simple + feel: I went with..., I was happy.
e.s: I went with my friend. I felt happy and relaxed.

e.p: How long did you stay there?
e.m: Nói thời gian bạn ở lại (mấy tiếng hoặc mấy ngày). Nói một hoạt động bạn làm trong thời gian đó.
e.h: Use 'for' + time: for two days; Past simple for activity.
e.s: I stayed there for two days. I walked in the park and took photos.

e.p: What was the weather like?
e.m: Mô tả thời tiết ngắn gọn. Nói cách thời tiết ảnh hưởng đến bạn.
e.h: It was + adjective; then effect: so I ...
e.s: It was sunny and warm. I enjoyed the sun and felt good.

e.p: Would you go there again?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I would' or 'No, I would not' + reason.
e.s: Yes, I would go again. The place was peaceful and fun.

e.p: Did you go to the beach last month?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói tên bãi biển hoặc thành phố nếu có.
e.h: Past simple: Yes, I did / No, I did not; I went to ...
e.s: Yes, I did. I went to the small beach near my city.

e.p: What did you do at the beach?
e.m: Nói một hoạt động chính bạn làm. Nói cảm nhận về hoạt động đó.
e.h: Past simple for actions; use 'It was' for feeling.
e.s: I swam in the sea. It was fun and a bit cold.

e.p: How many people were with you?
e.m: Nói số người (approx). Nói mối quan hệ ngắn gọn (friend/family).
e.h: There were + number; then 'with' + people.
e.s: There were four people with me. They were my friends.

e.p: What did you eat there?
e.m: Nói một món bạn đã ăn. Nói bạn có thích không.
e.h: Past simple: I ate ... ; I liked / I did not like ...
e.s: I ate grilled fish. I liked it because it was fresh.

e.p: How did you go to the beach?
e.m: Nói phương tiện bạn dùng. Nói thời gian đi (khoảng bao lâu).
e.h: Use 'by' + transport or 'went by' + vehicle; use 'for' + time.
e.s: I went by bus. The trip took about one hour.

e.p: Did you meet your friends last weekend?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói nơi gặp gỡ.
e.h: Past simple: Yes, I met ... ; I met them at ...
e.s: Yes, I met them. We met at a small cafe downtown.

e.p: What did you do together?
e.m: Nói một hoạt động chính. Nói bạn có thích hoạt động đó không.
e.h: Past simple + opinion: I liked / I enjoyed ...
e.s: We walked in the park and played games. I enjoyed the time with friends.

e.p: How often do you meet them?
e.m: Nói tần suất (always/often/sometimes). Nói một việc bạn thường làm khi gặp họ.
e.h: Use frequency adverb + present simple: I often meet ... I usually ...
e.s: I often meet them on weekends. We usually eat and talk together.

e.p: Who paid for food last time?
e.m: Nói ai trả tiền. Nói cảm thấy thế nào về điều đó.
e.h: Past simple: He/She paid. Use 'I felt' for feeling.
e.s: My friend paid for the food. I felt grateful and happy.

e.p: Would you recommend this plan to others?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + reason with 'because'.
e.s: Yes, I would recommend it. It is cheap and fun.

e.p: Did you visit any park last weekend?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói tên hoặc mô tả ngắn công viên.
e.h: Past simple: I visited / I did not visit; use short description.
e.s: Yes, I visited a small park near my house. It has big trees.

e.p: What did you see there?
e.m: Nói một vật hoặc cảnh bạn thấy. Nói cảm xúc ngắn về điều đó.
e.h: Past simple for seeing: I saw ... ; use 'It was' for feeling.
e.s: I saw many birds and children playing. It was nice to watch.

e.p: How many hours did you walk?
e.m: Nói thời lượng đi bộ. Nói bạn có mệt không.
e.h: Use 'for' + time; then 'I was' + adjective.
e.s: I walked for two hours. I was a little tired.

e.p: Did you take photos?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói mục đích chụp ảnh (kỷ niệm/vì đẹp).
e.h: Past simple: Yes, I took photos; use 'for' + purpose.
e.s: Yes, I took many photos. I took them for memories.

e.p: Would you go there on a weekday?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn gọn (về yên tĩnh/đông).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + short reason.
e.s: No, I would not go on a weekday. It is usually busy then.

d.t: Ăn uống khi đi du lịch

e.p: What did you eat on your last trip?
e.m: Nói một món bạn ăn. Nói bạn ăn ở đâu (ví dụ: quán, ngoài trời).
e.h: Past simple: I ate ... ; I ate at ...
e.s: I ate noodles. I ate them at a small street stall.

e.p: Did you try any new food?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nếu có, nêu tên và cảm nhận ngắn.
e.h: Past simple: Yes, I tried ... ; I liked / I did not like ...
e.s: Yes, I tried grilled corn. I liked it because it was sweet.

e.p: How much did a meal cost?
e.m: Ước lượng giá tiền (khoảng). Nói bạn có thấy đắt hay rẻ không.
e.h: Use 'about' + price; then opinion: It was cheap/expensive.
e.s: A meal cost about five dollars. It was cheap and good.

e.p: Who cooked or bought the food?
e.m: Nói ai chuẩn bị đồ ăn. Nói bạn có giúp không.
e.h: Past simple: He/She cooked / bought; I helped / I did not help.
e.s: My friend bought the food. I helped a little with drinks.

e.p: Do you like street food when you travel?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Present simple: I like / I do not like + reason.
e.s: Yes, I like street food. It is tasty and cheap.

e.p: Did you pack your bag for the trip?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói một đồ bạn đã đem theo.
e.h: Past simple: I packed / I did not pack; I took ...
e.s: Yes, I packed my bag. I took one towel and a hat.

e.p: How many clothes did you take?
e.m: Nói số lượng quần áo (approx). Nói bạn có mang đồ nặng không.
e.h: Use 'about' + number; then 'It was' + adjective.
e.s: I took about five clothes. It was not heavy.

e.p: Did you forget anything?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nếu có, nêu thứ đã quên và kết quả ngắn.
e.h: Past simple: Yes, I forgot ... ; Then result: so I ...
e.s: Yes, I forgot my camera. So I used my phone for photos.

e.p: Did you buy anything for the trip?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nếu có, nêu món đồ bạn mua.
e.h: Past simple: I bought ...
e.s: Yes, I bought sunscreen. It was useful under the sun.

e.p: Do you pack light or heavy usually?
e.m: Nói thói quen của bạn (light/heavy). Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Present simple: I usually pack light/heavy + reason.
e.s: I usually pack light. I like to move easily.

d.t: Di chuyển: xe buýt, tàu, xe máy

e.p: How did you travel to your last place?
e.m: Nói một phương tiện bạn dùng. Nói lý do chọn phương tiện đó.
e.h: Past simple: I went by ... ; because ...
e.s: I went by bus. It was cheap and easy.

e.p: How long was the trip?
e.m: Nói thời gian chuyến đi. Nói bạn có ngủ trên đường không.
e.h: Use 'for' + time; then 'I slept' or 'I did not sleep'.
e.s: The trip was about three hours. I did not sleep, I watched outside.

e.p: Did you buy a ticket before or on the bus?
e.m: Nói bạn mua vé trước hay trên xe. Nói cảm thấy việc đó thuận tiện không.
e.h: Past simple: I bought ... ; It was convenient/not convenient.
e.s: I bought the ticket on the bus. It was easy but a little slow.

e.p: Was the vehicle crowded?
e.m: Nói có đông không. Nói bạn làm gì khi đông.
e.h: It was + adjective; then action: so I ...
e.s: Yes, it was crowded. So I stood and listened to music.

e.p: Would you take the same transport again?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + reason with 'because'.
e.s: No, I would not take it again. It was slow and crowded.

d.t: Ở khách sạn hoặc nhà nghỉ

e.p: Where did you stay during your trip?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn ở (hotel/guest house/friend). Nói vị trí ngắn (near/in).
e.h: Past simple: I stayed at/in ... ; use 'near' for location.
e.s: I stayed at a small guest house. It was near the city center.

e.p: Was the room big or small?
e.m: Mô tả kích thước phòng (big/small). Nói bạn có thoải mái không.
e.h: It was + big/small; I felt comfortable/uncomfortable.
e.s: The room was small but clean. I felt comfortable there.

e.p: Did you share the room with someone?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nếu có, nêu người và mối quan hệ.
e.h: Past simple: Yes, I shared with ... ; He/She is my ...
e.s: Yes, I shared with my sister. She is kind and quiet.

e.p: How much did the room cost?
e.m: Ước lượng giá (khoảng). Nói bạn có thấy giá hợp lý không.
e.h: Use 'about' + price; then opinion: It was cheap/expensive.
e.s: The room cost about twenty dollars per night. It was cheap and nice.

e.p: Would you stay there again?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + short reason.
e.s: Yes, I would stay there again. The staff were friendly.

e.p: What natural view did you like most?
e.m: Nói một cảnh tự nhiên bạn thích. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: I liked the ... because ...
e.s: I liked the lake most. It was calm and pretty.

e.p: Was it hot or cold during the day?
e.m: Nói nhiệt độ (hot/cold). Nói bạn mặc gì để phù hợp.
e.h: It was + hot/cold; I wore ...
e.s: It was hot during the day. I wore a T-shirt and hat.

e.p: Did you watch the sunset or sunrise?
e.m: Nói bạn có xem hoàng hôn/bình minh không. Nói cảm giác ngắn.
e.h: Past simple: I watched the sunset/sunrise; I felt ...
e.s: Yes, I watched the sunset. I felt calm and happy.

e.p: Were there many trees or flowers?
e.m: Mô tả có nhiều hay ít. Nói bạn có chụp ảnh không.
e.h: There were many/few ... ; I took photos / I did not take photos.
e.s: There were many trees and flowers. I took some photos.

e.p: Did the weather change suddenly?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói bạn đã làm gì khi thay đổi thời tiết.
e.h: Past simple: It changed; then action: so I ...
e.s: Yes, it rained suddenly. So I used my umbrella and stayed inside.

d.t: Mua đồ kỷ niệm và quà

e.p: Did you buy any souvenirs?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói một món đồ bạn mua.
e.h: Past simple: I bought ...
e.s: Yes, I bought a small magnet. It is pretty and cheap.

e.p: How much did the souvenir cost?
e.m: Nói giá (ước lượng). Nói bạn có mua vì ai không.
e.h: Use 'about' + price; then 'for' + person.
e.s: It cost about three dollars. I bought it for my sister.

e.p: Did you like shopping there?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói một lý do ngắn.
e.h: Present simple: I liked / I did not like + reason.
e.s: Yes, I liked shopping there. The market was friendly.

e.p: Did you bargain the price?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói kết quả ngắn (save money/not).
e.h: Past simple: I bargained / I did not bargain; then result.
e.s: No, I did not bargain. The price was already low.

e.p: Would you buy the same souvenir again?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + reason.
e.s: No, I would not buy the same one. I want a different gift next time.

d.t: Gặp sự cố nhỏ khi đi chơi

e.p: Did anything go wrong on your trip?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nếu có, nêu sự cố ngắn.
e.h: Past simple: Yes, something went wrong: ...
e.s: Yes, my phone battery died. I could not use maps.

e.p: How did you solve the problem?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn làm để giải quyết. Nói kết quả ngắn.
e.h: Past simple: I asked / I borrowed / I went to ... ; then result.
e.s: I asked a shop for help and charged my phone. Then I could find the way.

e.p: Were you worried or calm?
e.m: Nói cảm xúc của bạn (worried/calm). Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: I was worried/calm because ...
e.s: I was a little worried at first. But I felt calm after help arrived.

e.p: Did someone help you?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nêu ai và hành động giúp đỡ.
e.h: Past simple: Yes, someone helped: He/She ...
e.s: Yes, a shop owner helped me. He let me use his charger.

e.p: Would you change anything next time?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói điều bạn sẽ làm khác.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + plan with 'I will ...' or 'I would ...'.
e.s: Yes, I would bring a power bank next time. It will help me avoid trouble.

d.t: Hoạt động ngoài trời: công viên, đi bộ, câu cá

e.p: Did you do any outdoor activity recently?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói tên hoạt động (walk/fishing).
e.h: Past simple: I did ... / I went ...
e.s: Yes, I went fishing last weekend. It was quiet and nice.

e.p: How long did the activity last?
e.m: Nói thời gian hoạt động. Nói bạn có mệt không.
e.h: Use 'for' + time; then 'I was' + adjective.
e.s: The activity lasted for three hours. I was a little tired but happy.

e.p: Did you enjoy the activity?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Past simple + opinion: I enjoyed it because ...
e.s: Yes, I enjoyed it. It was peaceful and fun.

e.p: Who did you meet there?
e.m: Nói ai bạn gặp (friend/family/stranger). Nói hành động ngắn họ làm.
e.h: Past simple: I met ... ; They were ...
e.s: I met a friendly old man. He showed me how to fish.

e.p: Would you go again next month?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + reason.
e.s: Yes, I would go again next month. The place is calm and cheap.

d.t: Ôn tập: Ký ức du lịch gia đình

e.p: Where did your family go last holiday?
e.m: Nói nơi cả gia đình đã đến. Nói một hoạt động cả nhà làm.
e.h: Past simple: We went to ... ; We did ...
e.s: We went to the countryside. We had a picnic and walked together.

e.p: How many people were in your family trip?
e.m: Nói số người tham gia. Nói ai là người lớn nhất hoặc nhỏ nhất.
e.h: There were + number; then identify oldest/youngest.
e.s: There were six people on the trip. My grandfather was the oldest.

e.p: What food did your family enjoy?
e.m: Nói một món cả nhà thích. Nói bạn có giúp nấu không.
e.h: Past simple: We ate ... ; I helped / I did not help.
e.s: We ate grilled chicken. I helped to prepare the salad.

e.p: Did you take a car or bus with family?
e.m: Nói phương tiện gia đình dùng. Nói thời gian đi (khoảng).
e.h: Past simple: We went by car/bus; It took ...
e.s: We went by car. The trip took about four hours.

e.p: Would your family like to go again?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói một lý do ngắn cho câu trả lời.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + reason.
e.s: Yes, my family would go again. We had a good time together.

d.t: Ôn tập: Cuối tuần thú vị

e.p: What was the best thing last weekend?
e.m: Nói một điều bạn thích nhất. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Past simple + reason: I liked ... because ...
e.s: The best thing was a small concert. I liked the music and people.

e.p: Did you buy any food or drink?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói món bạn mua.
e.h: Past simple: I bought ...
e.s: Yes, I bought lemonade. It was cold and sweet.

e.p: How did you feel after the weekend?
e.m: Nói cảm xúc chung (happy/tired). Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: I felt + adjective; because ...
e.s: I felt happy and a bit tired. I walked a lot and talked with friends.

e.p: Who did you tell about your weekend?
e.m: Nói người bạn kể (friend/family). Nói một câu họ nói phản hồi (ngắn).
e.h: Past simple: I told ... ; They said ...
e.s: I told my sister about it. She said it sounded fun.

e.p: Will you plan a similar weekend soon?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói việc bạn sẽ làm cho lần tới.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + future plan 'I will ...' or 'I would ...'.
e.s: Yes, I will plan a similar weekend. I will invite more friends next time.

d.t: Ôn tập: Kể chuyện trước lớp

e.p: Can you tell the class where you went?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn đi ngắn gọn. Nói khi nào (last weekend/yesterday).
e.h: Past simple: I went to ... last weekend/yesterday.
e.s: I went to the nearby lake last weekend. It was a short trip with friends.

e.p: Share one funny moment from your trip.
e.m: Nói một khoảnh khắc hài hước. Nói tại sao bạn cười.
e.h: Past simple: Someone did ... ; I laughed because ...
e.s: A dog stole our snack and ran away. We laughed because it was funny.

e.p: What did you learn from this trip?
e.m: Nói một điều bạn học được (kỹ năng/kinh nghiệm). Nói cách bạn dùng điều đó sau này.
e.h: Past simple + present use: I learned ... ; Now I ...
e.s: I learned to plan time better. Now I pack earlier before trips.

e.p: How would you give advice to classmates about traveling?
e.m: Nói một lời khuyên ngắn. Nói lý do ngắn cho lời khuyên.
e.h: Use 'You should ...' or 'Bring ...' + reason.
e.s: You should bring a water bottle. It helps you stay healthy and active.

e.p: Will you share your photos with the class?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói cách bạn sẽ chia sẻ (show/send).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' + method: I will show / send ...
e.s: Yes, I will show some photos. I will put them in a small slideshow.
